## Lumentum Seen as Reasonable on Cash Flow but Stretched on Earnings Valuation

The cash-flow-vs-earnings valuation divergence on LITE is a common characteristic of optical components names with lumpy capex cycles; for a PM the actionable question is which metric is more predictive of the next re-rating, and today's headline does not resolve that — no catalyst to act on.

- Valuation note frames LITE as a split picture: cash-flow based metrics look reasonable; earnings-based metrics appear stretched.
- No new fundamental catalyst or guidance update cited.
- Single-outlet coverage; low confidence classification.
- No specific multiples or price targets given in the headline.
- Sentiment is cautiously balanced rather than directionally bullish or bearish.
